meaning: n.分配,分发,配给物,销售,法院对无遗嘱死亡者财产的分配,分布状态,区分,分类 发送,发行
examples: They studied the geographical distribution of the disease.
The map shows the distribution of this species across the world.
He tried to even out the distribution of work among his employees.
Just to make things more convoluted, food production and distribution is now an internationalised system.
That could mean publishing restaurant reviews in Mandarin or finding new platforms for distribution.
